meaning: adj.强大的,令人敬畏的,可怕的,艰难的
examples: We have a formidable task ahead of us.
The elderly are a formidable force in any election.
The task was a formidable one.
South Africa's youth presents a formidable challenge to people who want to entice them.
After an easy win against Bangladesh, England found the Proteas predictably more formidable in Barbados.
